title: Process of Evaluating a Polynomial of a Matrix
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of taking a standard polynomial function and applying it to a square matrix, resulting in a new matrix.
elements: Input Polynomial: p(x) = aₙxⁿ + aₙ₋₁xⁿ⁻¹ + ... + a₁x + a₀
relationships: The input polynomial defines the coefficients and exponents
The variable x in the polynomial is replaced by the square matrix A
Exponents become repeated matrix multiplication (A² = A*A, A³ = A*A*A, etc.)
Scalar coefficients are applied via scalar multiplication
All terms are combined using matrix addition to produce the final result p(A)
